category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Erg as a statically typed language compatible with Python.
source_facts.description says it is a statically typed language for the Python ecosystem.
display_name_sources: Official Erg documentation and GitHub repository use the name Erg.
docs_sources: Official Erg install page documents installation and source build workflow.
Official Erg site hosts The Erg Book as language documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/erg-lang/erg; repo lookup intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: Official Erg site and GitHub repository describe Erg as Python-compatible and document installation from the GitHub source.
source_facts.description identifies a statically typed language for Python ecosystem improvement.
